\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Homogeneous medium with Bloch‑periodic excitation/\+Green\textquotesingle{}s function. 

The constructor selects a periodic Green\textquotesingle{}s function according to the number of provided lattice vectors. Currently a 2D periodic Green\textquotesingle{}s function is created when two lattice vectors are given; otherwise a warning is printed (extension point for 1D/3D periodicity). 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{DomainHom3DPer_8h_source_l00028}{28}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{DomainHom3DPer_8h_source}{Domain\+Hom3\+DPer.\+h}}.

{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{classDomainHom3DPer_a973f16aa5d1165725d3d0bdab331781f} 
Domain\+Hom3\+DPer\+::\+Domain\+Hom3\+DPer (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{classSurfaceMesh}{Surface\+Mesh}} \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{in\+Mesh}{, }\item[{int}]{in\+DIndex}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}}]{in\+Epsilon}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}}]{in\+Mu}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_a52196b4b274b585226e0614490f7defc}{dcmplx}}}]{in\+Vacuum\+Wavelength}{, }\item[{\mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_ae4271193b04e5d22237184d4fad54fb0}{rvec}}}]{bloch\+Vector}{, }\item[{std\+::vector$<$ \mbox{\hyperlink{globals_8h_ae4271193b04e5d22237184d4fad54fb0}{rvec}} $>$}]{lattice\+Vectors}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



Construct a periodic homogeneous domain and select a periodic Green\textquotesingle{}s function. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em in\+Mesh} & Surface mesh containing the region {\ttfamily in\+DIndex}. \\
\hline
{\em in\+DIndex} & Region index within {\ttfamily in\+Mesh}. \\
\hline
{\em in\+Epsilon} & Relative permittivity of the homogeneous medium. \\
\hline
{\em in\+Mu} & Relative permeability of the homogeneous medium. \\
\hline
{\em in\+Vacuum\+Wavelength} & Free‑space wavelength. \\
\hline
{\em bloch\+Vector} & Bloch vector used for Floquet–\+Bloch conditions. \\
\hline
{\em lattice\+Vectors} & List of lattice vectors defining periodicity. If the list has size 2, a 2D periodic Green\textquotesingle{}s function is created with these vectors.\\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
If exactly two lattice vectors are provided, a 2D periodic homogeneous Green\textquotesingle{}s function (\doxylink{classGreenFHom3DPer2D}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer2D}) is instantiated. Otherwise, a warning is printed (hook for future 1D/3D periodic Green\textquotesingle{}s function implementations).
